title: telis retrorsa
intro: Telis retrorsa, also known as the "Retrose Telis", is a plant species that belongs to the genus Telis, a type of flowering plant. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Telis retrorsa include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Telis retrorsa typically involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically as a poultice or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
